title: The Passionate Pilgrim
writer: Donnah Darrell, Samuel Merwin, George DuBois Proctor
actors: Matt Moore, Mary Newcomb, Julia Swayne Gordon
plot: An innocent man goes to prison for obstruction of justice when his wife refuses to reveal that her father was killed by her mother (and it wasn't suicide). When he is finally released, he meets and becomes involved with a young wo...
